nasb.text: But the high places were not taken away; nevertheless the heart of Asa was wholly devoted to the Lord all his days.

esv.text: But the high places were not taken away. Nevertheless, the heart of Asa was wholly true to the Lord all his days.

cnv.text: 只是邱壇還沒有廢去；不過亞撒一生都完完全全歸向耶和華。

ccb.text: 虽然他没有拆毁丘坛，但他一生忠于耶和华。
